default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content strategy, event planning, and new marketing initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/sfHLfRht4EzHK71u3_MvtUDby4ccFfxd?tab=summary&timestamp=108.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Goal: 75 Articles by EOW.** The target is 75 total articles by EOW, up from 25. To unblock the current bottleneck, Nancy will coordinate with JP to streamline the review process.](https://fathom.video/share/sfHLfRht4EzHK71u3_MvtUDby4ccFfxd?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
  - [**New DA Event Strategy.** Explore targeted events (workshops, webinars) to recruit specific expert profiles (e.g., MBAs) where high-touch recruitment is currently struggling.](https://fathom.video/share/sfHLfRht4EzHK71u3_MvtUDby4ccFfxd?tab=summary&timestamp=861.0)
  - [**New Amplitude Dashboard Live.** A new dashboard is live, tracking content performance by filtering out social and direct traffic to isolate organic SEO results.](https://fathom.video/share/sfHLfRht4EzHK71u3_MvtUDby4ccFfxd?tab=summary&timestamp=118.0)
  - [**LinkedIn Monitoring Tool Launching.** A new tool will de-anonymize website visitors, enabling targeted outreach to high-intent leads who didn't convert (e.g., complete an assessment).](https://fathom.video/share/sfHLfRht4EzHK71u3_MvtUDby4ccFfxd?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy & Performance

  - [**Dashboard:** A new Amplitude dashboard tracks content performance, filtering out social and direct traffic to isolate organic SEO results.](https://fathom.video/share/sfHLfRht4EzHK71u3_MvtUDby4ccFfxd?tab=summary&timestamp=118.0)
  - [**Strategy:** Build DA as a developer resource via high-volume publishing, starting with a "Data Structures and Algorithms" cluster.](https://fathom.video/share/sfHLfRht4EzHK71u3_MvtUDby4ccFfxd?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)
  - [**Workflow:** AI agents → human editors (full-stack engineers) for review.](https://fathom.video/share/sfHLfRht4EzHK71u3_MvtUDby4ccFfxd?tab=summary&timestamp=294.0)
  - [**Forecast:** A forecast sheet models traffic by assuming a percentage of existing competitor traffic. Jason will share access.](https://fathom.video/share/sfHLfRht4EzHK71u3_MvtUDby4ccFfxd?tab=summary&timestamp=317.0)

### Content Production & Bottleneck

  - [**Goal:** 75 total articles live by EOW (up from 25).](https://fathom.video/share/sfHLfRht4EzHK71u3_MvtUDby4ccFfxd?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
  - [**Bottleneck:** JP's review time is the sole blocker.](https://fathom.video/share/sfHLfRht4EzHK71u3_MvtUDby4ccFfxd?tab=summary&timestamp=411.0)
  - [**Solution:** Nancy will coordinate with JP to streamline the process.](https://fathom.video/share/sfHLfRht4EzHK71u3_MvtUDby4ccFfxd?tab=summary&timestamp=411.0)
      - [**New Rule:** JP reviews only DA-specific content. General developer articles can go live immediately.](https://fathom.video/share/sfHLfRht4EzHK71u3_MvtUDby4ccFfxd?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)
      - [**Process:** Publish first, then flag for optional review and post-edit.](https://fathom.video/share/sfHLfRht4EzHK71u3_MvtUDby4ccFfxd?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)

### New DA Event Strategy

  - [**Problem:** High-touch recruitment for specific expert profiles (e.g., MBA finance) is struggling.](https://fathom.video/share/sfHLfRht4EzHK71u3_MvtUDby4ccFfxd?tab=summary&timestamp=1113.0)
  - [**Idea:** Use targeted events to attract and convert these profiles.](https://fathom.video/share/sfHLfRht4EzHK71u3_MvtUDby4ccFfxd?tab=summary&timestamp=1181.0)
  - [**Model:** Workshops or webinars, not high-cost dinners.](https://fathom.video/share/sfHLfRht4EzHK71u3_MvtUDby4ccFfxd?tab=summary&timestamp=1181.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Cost per acquisition (CPA) must align with the expert's value. A $2k CPA for an MBA is viable, but a $50k CPA for a professor justifies a different event format.](https://fathom.video/share/sfHLfRht4EzHK71u3_MvtUDby4ccFfxd?tab=summary&timestamp=1282.0)
  - [**Action:** Nancy will share a workshop example for the team to evaluate.](https://fathom.video/share/sfHLfRht4EzHK71u3_MvtUDby4ccFfxd?tab=summary&timestamp=1240.0)

### Event & Tooling Updates

  - [**Engineer Data Summit (Feb):** Pursuing a keynote slot via a mutual connection to Sean.](https://fathom.video/share/sfHLfRht4EzHK71u3_MvtUDby4ccFfxd?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [**Seattle Event:** Postponed to December. Surge AI is supporting venue selection.](https://fathom.video/share/sfHLfRht4EzHK71u3_MvtUDby4ccFfxd?tab=summary&timestamp=736.0)
  - [**New York Dinner:** Canceled.](https://fathom.video/share/sfHLfRht4EzHK71u3_MvtUDby4ccFfxd?tab=summary&timestamp=736.0)
  - [**Tooling:**](https://fathom.video/share/sfHLfRht4EzHK71u3_MvtUDby4ccFfxd?tab=summary&timestamp=773.0)
      - [**Link Preview Fix:** A script is ready, pending Mason's feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/sfHLfRht4EzHK71u3_MvtUDby4ccFfxd?tab=summary&timestamp=773.0)
      - [**LinkedIn Monitoring:** Launching today to de-anonymize website visitors for targeted outreach.](https://fathom.video/share/sfHLfRht4EzHK71u3_MvtUDby4ccFfxd?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jason:** Share the content forecast sheet with the team.](https://fathom.video/share/sfHLfRht4EzHK71u3_MvtUDby4ccFfxd?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)
  - [**Nancy:**](https://fathom.video/share/sfHLfRht4EzHK71u3_MvtUDby4ccFfxd?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)
      - [Coordinate with JP to streamline the content review process.](https://fathom.video/share/sfHLfRht4EzHK71u3_MvtUDby4ccFfxd?tab=summary&timestamp=411.0)
      - [Share the workshop event example for the DA team to evaluate.](https://fathom.video/share/sfHLfRht4EzHK71u3_MvtUDby4ccFfxd?tab=summary&timestamp=1240.0)
  - [**Surge AI Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/sfHLfRht4EzHK71u3_MvtUDby4ccFfxd?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)
      - [Launch the LinkedIn monitoring tool today.](https://fathom.video/share/sfHLfRht4EzHK71u3_MvtUDby4ccFfxd?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)
      - [Continue publishing articles, flagging them for optional review post-launch.](https://fathom.video/share/sfHLfRht4EzHK71u3_MvtUDby4ccFfxd?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)

action_items.description: Add per-article breakdown to Amplitude dashboard
Email DA forecast sheet to Nancy, jasonsexton, Akash
Align w/ JP on DA-related content review; confirm non-DA can publish
Email Jason Gong workshop/webinar example + finance-expert outreach plan
